details: Combosquat of the legitimate `bs58` Base58 encoding library. The `decode()` function wraps `bs58.decode()` with a `sendMessage()` call that POSTs the user-supplied input to Telegram via hardcoded bot token ([redacted-credential]) and chat ID (7631491367) at api[.]telegram[.]org. Any private key, wallet seed, or sensitive data a user passes to decode() is silently exfiltrated to the attacker's Telegram C2 channel (group t[.]me/+IDl6XgFBZdI1ZjZh). Publisher an account Package also ships `!bs58-private-key[.]zip` containing a bundled npm project.
